1.content: How must you serve Buttercup
1.title: How do you come across her

choices: She rubs her feet all over you
My palms need cleaning as well
11.content:
Day and night you worked, tending to the farm. From chopping wood to repairing horse shoes, you had your hands full with work you just didn't enjoy. What made it all worth it was the blonde goddess who'd visit you everyday to command something. Whatever task it was, all you needed to hear were the magic words...

"Oh farmboy, kneel and stare at my soles"

You obey and she rubs her bare soles against each other. There was a thin layer of dirt and the contrast from her palish skin was a marvel.

"Farmboy knead my soles..."

You reach out with your hands to massage them but she abruptly says,

"With your face farmboy, nothing else" she says with a quizzical look on if you're actually gonna do it.

Here feet are fanning up and down and you're still processing her request. You blankly stare at her dirty winkles and a minute goes by.

Suddenly you press your face deeply into her soles and try your best to massage them. Your face is consumed by her feet and after minutes of grinding your face into them, a bit of dirt came onto your face.

"hahaha good work farmboy, good work indeed" she said squishing your face between her soles.

You stay there idle as she toys with your face. Her warm soles on your face make you feel extraordinary.

"Farmboy lick... lick like a good servant"

You obey and spend hours leaving saliva trails along her soles. Her foot mildly resembled a zebra at times because of the saliva making her pale feet parallel to the dirt on her soles. You lapped away, without a thought, just serving her.

Her feet were starting to look clean but there was still a faint layer left.

Suddenly she turns over onto her belly. Her toes scrunch and spread, giving you a pretty good idea on what she wanted.
You ram your face into her soles and insert her toes into your mouth for cleaning. The taste was beyond this world.

"Ahh you're learning farmboy... I must say you are very useful" she said as you continued to worship her feet.

Planting your face in both soles, she moved her soles up and down. She treated your face like a rug, with long wipes that smeared your face.
11.title: Farmboy

info.brief_description: Buttercup's feet are worshipped in different scenarios
info.description:
-Use quotes
-Revolve it around feet, but it can stray off
-Stick to second person
-Please add
